skills.name: test-targeted
skills.description: Run tests matching changed files only (fast, <5s)

skills.name: test-before-complete
skills.description: Comprehensive test coverage check with semantic gap analysis - run before completing any feature

skills.name: test-fix-failures
skills.description: Diagnose and fix failing tests - classifies root cause and offers fixes

skills.name: test-generate
skills.description: Generate comprehensive tests for a specific source file

skills.name: test-coverage-report
skills.description: Live coverage analysis with per-file breakdown and priority recommendations

skills.name: frontend-test-setup
skills.description: One-time bootstrap of Jest + React Testing Library for Next.js 14 frontend

skills.name: test-api-contract
skills.description: Validate API route changes match Pydantic schemas

skills.name: test-regression-guard
skills.description: Guard against test regressions - warns if test count decreases or tests break

skills.name: quality-check
skills.description: Run black and ruff quality checks after backend code changes

skills.name: type-check
skills.description: Run TypeScript type checks after frontend code changes

skills.name: docker-health
skills.description: Check all Docker services are running and healthy

skills.name: rag-smoke-test
skills.description: Test the RAG pipeline end-to-end (embedding, retrieval, LLM) - requires live infrastructure

skills.name: pipeline-status
skills.description: Show video processing pipeline status and system diagnostics

skills.name: update-claude-md
skills.description: Check if CLAUDE.md needs updating based on recent code changes

skills.name: rag-architect
skills.description: RAG architecture advisor - evaluates pipeline decisions against best practices. Two modes: planning review (auto-consulted for RAG file changes) and full audit (/rag-architect)

skills.name: ux-review
skills.description: UX reviewer - visual inspection + code analysis of frontend pages. Two modes: page review (specify route) and full audit (walks all key routes). Uses browser automation for screenshots, accessibility trees, responsive testing, and dark mode validation.

skills.name: ux-flows
skills.description: Usability and engagement analyst - traces user journeys through the running app to find friction, dead ends, and missed engagement opportunities. Two modes: single flow (specify journey) and full assessment (all 6 core flows).

skills.name: product-builder
skills.description: Product architect — turns feature ideas into detailed implementation specs. Three modes: feature spec (ready-to-build plan for new content types or features), roadmap review (what to build next), and architecture check (multi-content compatibility).

skills.name: rag-quality-gate
skills.description: Validate RAG retrieval quality: intent classification accuracy, multi-video coverage, diversity metrics, and summary availability

skills.name: rag-eval
skills.description: Run retrieval evaluation against golden dataset. Computes recall@K, NDCG@K, MRR, answer quality.

skills.name: rag-eval-compare
skills.description: Compare current RAG metrics against saved baseline. Shows delta per metric.

skills.name: reembed-chunks
skills.description: Re-embed all chunks after embedding model change. Supports --dry-run, --batch-size, --video-id.

skills.name: conversation-quality
skills.description: Validate conversation behavioral contracts: memory retention, history limits, fact extraction timing

skills.name: citation-accuracy
skills.description: Validate citation grounding: was_used_in_response tracking, jump URL correctness, citation marker consistency

skills.name: content-parity
skills.description: Validate document and video processing parity: enrichment, chunking, citation consistency

skills.name: behavioral-contracts
skills.description: Full audit of all behavioral promises: memory, citations, accuracy, content parity. Run before major releases.
